name: Eggs Les Bains
short_description: Pigeons rule the roost in Eggs-les-Bains! In this whimsical hidden-object game, can you track down the 238 eggs hidden in every nook and cranny of this spa town? A quest that’s all about observation, guaranteed to be stress-free and with no time limit.
detailed_description:
The pigeons' coup has begun.

The pigeons have taken control, and chaos reigns in Eggs-les-Bains.

They’ve hidden 238 eggs from 17 different species in the city’s gardens, streets, and iconic landmarks.

Your mission? Find them all to finally understand why these birds are putting up a fight.

The charm of a French spa town, minus the stress.

Explore 14 neighborhoods inspired by the famous spa town of Aix-les-Bains.

From the bustling city center to the peaceful lakeside, via the racetrack: take the time to observe.

Here, there’s no score, no countdown. Just the joy of discovery and the tranquility of a contemplative stroll.

The art of observation.

Some eggs will catch your eye immediately.

Others are so well hidden that you’ll walk past them ten times without noticing.

Eggs-les-Bains is a challenge to your powers of observation, accessible to everyone, but rewarding for the most patient.

Ready for a dose of serenity in Eggs-les-Bains? Grab your magnifying glass and join the adventure now.
